SEARCH
Package org.openclover.ant.tasks

Class CloverReportTask.HistoricalEx

java.lang.Object
org.openclover.core.reporters.CloverReportConfig
org.openclover.core.reporters.Historical
org.openclover.ant.tasks.CloverReportTask.HistoricalEx
All Implemented Interfaces:
AntExtension
Enclosing class:
CloverReportTask
public static class CloverReportTask.HistoricalEx extends org.openclover.core.reporters.Historical implements AntExtension
Adapter class which provides a version of the Historical report configuration suitable for Ant use - i.e. able to accept filesets and able to resolve formats by reference

  • Nested Class Summary
